3. If you don't respond to the warning, your contacts get an SMS

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body:
JustInCase collects the following information:

- Account information: Your name and email address (provided via Google Sign-In)
- Trusted contacts: Names and phone numbers of up to 3 contacts you designate
- Check-in activity: Timestamps of your check-ins and app usage
- Device token: A push notification token for sending you alerts
- Preferences: Your inactivity threshold, grace period, and quiet hours settings
privacy.section2Body:
Your data is used exclusively to provide the JustInCase service:

- Monitor your check-in activity against your configured threshold
- Send you push notification reminders and warnings
- Send SMS alerts to your trusted contacts when triggered
- Maintain an audit log of check-ins and alerts for your review
privacy.section3Body:
JustInCase uses the following third-party services to operate:

- Supabase — Authentication and database hosting. Your account data and check-in records are stored in Supabase's cloud infrastructure.

- Firebase Cloud Messaging (Google) — Push notification delivery. Your device token is shared with Firebase to deliver notifications.

- Twilio — SMS delivery. Your trusted contacts' phone numbers are shared with Twilio solely for the purpose of sending alert messages.

Each third-party service is governed by its own privacy policy and data processing terms.
privacy.section4Body: Your data is stored securely in Supabase's cloud database with row-level security policies that ensure you can only access your own data. All communication between the app and our servers is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties beyond the service providers listed above.
privacy.section5Body: Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. Check-in and alert logs are kept for your reference and may be periodically pruned. When you delete your account, all associated data (profile, trusted contacts, check-in history, and alert logs) is permanently removed from our systems.
privacy.section6Body:
You have the right to:

- Access your personal data through the app
- Correct inaccurate information in your profile or contacts
- Delete your account and all associated data at any time
- Withdraw consent by disabling notifications or removing trusted contacts

If you are located in the EU/EEA, you may also have additional rights under GDPR including the right to data portability and the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy.section7Body: JustInCase is not intended for use by anyone under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor, we will take steps to delete it promptly.
privacy.section8Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make material changes, we will notify you through the app. Your continued use of JustInCase after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.section9Body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please contact us through the app's support channel.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: JustInCase is a personal safety monitoring application that tracks your check-in activity and alerts your designated trusted contacts via SMS if you fail to check in within your configured time window. The service is intended to provide an additional layer of personal safety and peace of mind.
terms.section2Body: You must be at least 18 years old to use JustInCase. By creating an account, you represent that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into these terms.
terms.section3Body:
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activity that occurs under your account. You agree to:

- Keep your account credentials secure
- Provide accurate contact information for your trusted contacts
- Obtain consent from your trusted contacts before adding their phone numbers
- Check in regularly according to your configured schedule
- Keep push notifications enabled for the app to function properly
terms.section4Body: By using JustInCase, you authorize the service to send SMS messages to your trusted contacts on your behalf when an inactivity alert is triggered. These messages will identify you by name and inform your contacts that you have not checked in. Standard messaging rates may apply to your trusted contacts. You are responsible for informing your contacts that they may receive these messages.
terms.section5Body: JustInCase requires push notification permissions to send you check-in reminders and inactivity warnings. Disabling push notifications may prevent the service from functioning as intended. JustInCase is not liable for missed alerts due to disabled notifications.
terms.section6Body:
JustInCase is not an emergency service and should not be used as a substitute for calling emergency services (e.g., 911, 112, 119). The service depends on internet connectivity, push notification delivery, and third-party SMS providers. We do not guarantee that alerts will be delivered in all circumstances.

JustInCase is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.
terms.section7Body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, JustInCase and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, arising from your use of the service.
terms.section8Body: You may delete your account at any time through the app settings. Upon deletion, your personal data and trusted contact information will be removed from our systems. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in abusive behavior.
terms.section9Body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. If we make material changes, we will notify you through the app. Your continued use of JustInCase after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.section10Body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through the app's support channel.
